channel.title: tutorial on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in tutorial on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: How to Upload Audio/Video to CastGarden
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: A quick and simple tutorial on how to upload audio/video to CastGarden. Plus I throw in a few simple tips to simplify and streamline the work flow.

item.title: How to Stream to CastGarden
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: A quick tutorial on how to live stream to CastGarden.
